name: Salamino Pinguino
lore:
Lore of Salamino Pinguino
                                    


Original (Italian)
Salamino penguino. Mezzo salame. Mezzo pinguino. Tutto problema, non scivola, si afetta. Non parla, sibila, Mamma Mia! Mangia mozzarella fusa e sputa pepperoni picanti. Salamino Penguino, la leggenda della salumeria!
Translated (English)
Salamino penguino. Half salami. Half penguin. Total problem, he doesn't slide, cuts. He doesn't speak, he hisses, oh my god! He eats melted mozzarella cheese and spits hot peppers. Salamino Penguino, the legend of the delicatessen!
